scripts.build: npm run build -w @bot-trading/core && npm run build -w @bot-trading/bot-cesta-topk && npm run build -w @bot-trading/bot-liquidity-maker && npm run build -w @bot-trading/bot-endgame-carry && npm run build -w @bot-trading/bot-espejo-smart && npm run build -w @bot-trading/dashboard-api && npm run build -w @bot-trading/dashboard-ui
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,ui -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @bot-trading/dashboard-api" "npm run dev -w @bot-trading/dashboard-ui"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,ui,cesta,heartbeat -c blue,magenta,green,yellow "npm run dev -w @bot-trading/dashboard-api" "npm run dev -w @bot-trading/dashboard-ui" "npm run dev -w @bot-trading/bot-cesta-topk" "npm run dev:heartbeat -w @bot-trading/core"
